title: Kitchen Remodel Contractor in Los Angeles, CA
metaTitle: Kitchen Remodel Contractor in Los Angeles, CA | Red Stag Construction
metaDescription: Expert kitchen remodel contractor in Los Angeles. Full gut remodels, cabinet replacement, countertops, layout changes, permits. Serving Beverly Hills, Sherman Oaks & all of LA. Call (626) 652-2303.
h1: Kitchen Remodel Contractor in Los Angeles, CA
intro:
A kitchen remodel is the highest-return renovation you can make to a Los Angeles home. In markets like Beverly Hills, Sherman Oaks, and Encino — where a well-executed kitchen adds $50,000 to $150,000 in resale value — the quality of the contractor you choose determines whether that investment pays off or costs you.

Red Stag handles kitchen remodels from complete gut-outs to targeted upgrades. We pull every permit, coordinate every trade, and manage every phase in-house. No subcontractor hand-offs. No gaps in accountability.

What a Red Stag kitchen remodel includes: complete demolition and debris removal, structural modifications where walls need to come down, new electrical and plumbing rough-in, custom cabinet installation, countertop fabrication and installation, tile backsplash, flooring, lighting, and finish hardware. We work with your designer or bring design recommendations based on your budget and the neighborhood standard.

Los Angeles kitchens in 2026 are trending toward open-concept layouts, waterfall countertops, mixed metal hardware, and integrated appliances. We've built all of it — from a $40,000 Sherman Oaks refresh to a $180,000 complete redesign in Beverly Hills. Every job gets the same level of oversight.

Timeline for a full kitchen remodel in Los Angeles runs 8–14 weeks depending on scope, permit processing time, and material lead times. We set realistic timelines at the start and we don't make promises we can't keep.

title: Bathroom Remodel Contractor in Los Angeles, CA
metaTitle: Bathroom Remodel Contractor in Los Angeles, CA | Red Stag Construction
metaDescription: Licensed bathroom remodel contractor in Los Angeles. Walk-in showers, full gut remodels, tile, fixtures & permits handled. Beverly Hills, Encino, Brentwood & all of LA. Call (626) 652-2303.
h1: Bathroom Remodel Contractor in Los Angeles, CA
intro:
Bathroom remodels in Los Angeles have one of the highest ROI of any home improvement project. A master bath renovation in Encino or Sherman Oaks that's executed correctly returns between 60% and 80% of its cost at resale — and in Beverly Hills or Bel Air, a high-end bathroom is a baseline expectation, not a luxury.

Red Stag does full bathroom remodels from complete gut-outs to targeted upgrades. We handle everything: demo, waterproofing, shower pan installation, tile, plumbing fixture replacement, vanity and countertop installation, lighting, ventilation, and finish work. Every bathroom remodel that involves plumbing or electrical changes is permitted — no exceptions.

Primary bathroom trends in the LA market right now: large format tile (24x48 and larger), freestanding tubs, frameless glass shower enclosures, floating vanities, heated floors, and matte black or brushed gold fixtures. We've installed all of it across every price point.

A standard bathroom remodel in Los Angeles runs 4–8 weeks. A primary bath gut-out with structural changes can run 10–12 weeks. We give you a realistic timeline on day one.

title: ADU Contractor in Los Angeles, CA
metaTitle: ADU Contractor in Los Angeles, CA | Red Stag Construction
metaDescription: Licensed ADU contractor in Los Angeles. We handle design, permits, engineering & construction for accessory dwelling units. Studio City, Sherman Oaks, Encino & all of LA. Call (626) 652-2303.
h1: ADU Contractor in Los Angeles, CA
intro:
Los Angeles has made it easier to build an ADU than at any point in the city's history. SB 9, SB 10, and LA's own ADU ordinance have removed most of the barriers that used to make accessory dwelling units cost-prohibitive. What that means for homeowners: your property can now generate rental income, house a family member, or add significant equity — without selling.

Red Stag builds ADUs across Los Angeles and the San Fernando Valley. Detached ADUs, attached ADUs, garage conversions, and JADUs (junior accessory dwelling units). We handle the entire process: feasibility assessment, design, engineering, permit application, and construction.

The permit process for an ADU in Los Angeles runs 60 to 120 days depending on the type and location. We've navigated this process dozens of times. We know what LA Building and Safety wants to see, and we build the documentation to get approved the first time.

An ADU in Los Angeles typically costs between $180,000 and $350,000 depending on size, finish level, and site conditions. A garage conversion on the lower end. A fully detached 1,200 square foot ADU with high-end finishes on the upper end. We give you a realistic number before you commit to anything.

The rental market in LA for ADUs is strong. A 600-square-foot ADU in Sherman Oaks or Studio City generates $2,000 to $2,800 per month in rental income. Most ADUs break even on construction cost within 8 to 12 years — and add that value permanently to the property.

title: Custom Home Builder in Los Angeles, CA
metaTitle: Custom Home Builder in Los Angeles, CA | Red Stag Construction
metaDescription: Licensed custom home builder in Los Angeles. Design-build custom homes in Beverly Hills, Bel Air, Malibu & the San Fernando Valley. License #964664. Call (626) 652-2303.
h1: Custom Home Builder in Los Angeles, CA
intro:
Building a custom home in Los Angeles is one of the most complex construction projects you can undertake. The permitting process is demanding. The soil conditions in hillside neighborhoods require engineered foundations. HOA requirements in communities like Hidden Hills and Calabasas add another layer of design approval. And the cost of getting it wrong in a $2M–$5M land market is not recoverable.

Red Stag builds custom homes across Los Angeles. We've worked in Beverly Hills, Bel Air, Brentwood, Pacific Palisades, Malibu, and throughout the San Fernando Valley. We understand what each neighborhood requires — aesthetically, structurally, and from a permit standpoint.

Our design-build model puts your architect, engineer, and general contractor on the same team from day one. That eliminates the coordination gaps that turn good custom home projects into expensive disasters. You have one point of contact. One contract. One team that owns the outcome.

A custom home in Los Angeles typically runs 16 to 24 months from permit to move-in. Construction costs vary widely by location, size, and finish level — but in the markets we work in, budget $400 to $700 per square foot for a well-executed custom build. We'll give you a more precise number after we understand your land, your program, and your finish expectations.

title: Home Addition Contractor in Los Angeles, CA
metaTitle: Home Addition Contractor in Los Angeles, CA | Red Stag Construction
metaDescription: Licensed home addition contractor in Los Angeles. Room additions, second story additions, garage conversions & more. Serving Sherman Oaks, Encino, Beverly Hills & all of LA. Call (626) 652-2303.
h1: Home Addition Contractor in Los Angeles, CA
intro:
A home addition is the most cost-effective way to gain significant square footage in Los Angeles without moving. In neighborhoods like Sherman Oaks, Encino, and Studio City where homes were built in the 1950s and 60s, most properties have room to grow. A well-designed addition adds both livable space and market value.

Red Stag builds room additions, second story additions, master suite additions, kitchen expansions, and garage conversions. We handle structural engineering, permits, foundation work, framing, electrical, plumbing, insulation, drywall, and finishes.

Every addition project starts with a feasibility review. We look at your setbacks, your FAR (floor area ratio), your zoning, and your HOA restrictions if applicable. We tell you what's possible before you spend money on design. That saves you from investing in plans that can't get permitted.

A room addition in Los Angeles typically costs $200 to $400 per square foot depending on scope. A 400-square-foot family room addition in Sherman Oaks runs $80,000 to $160,000. A full second story addition is a larger investment — but it can double your square footage without touching your lot coverage.

title: Hardscape & Concrete Contractor in Los Angeles, CA
metaTitle: Hardscape Contractor in Los Angeles, CA | Red Stag Construction
metaDescription: Hardscape & concrete contractor in Los Angeles. Patios, driveways, retaining walls, pavers, concrete work & outdoor living spaces. Serving all of LA. Call (626) 652-2303.
h1: Hardscape & Concrete Contractor in Los Angeles, CA
intro:
Hardscape is where the exterior of a Los Angeles home either reinforces its value or undermines it. A cracked driveway, deteriorating retaining wall, or outdated concrete patio in a neighborhood like Brentwood or Pacific Palisades signals deferred maintenance to every buyer who drives by.

Red Stag builds and remodels hardscape across Los Angeles. Concrete driveways and walkways, paver patios and driveways, retaining walls, outdoor kitchens, fire pits, and pool decks. We also handle concrete repair and resurfacing for existing flatwork that needs to be salvaged rather than replaced.

In hillside properties throughout Bel Air, Malibu, and the Hollywood Hills, retaining walls are structural elements — not just aesthetic. We engineer them correctly, permit them, and build them to handle the soil and drainage conditions specific to the site.

A note on waterproofing: elevated decks, balconies, and roof decks in Los Angeles require proper waterproofing membrane installation before any finish surface is applied. We include waterproofing as a standard element of every elevated hardscape project — not as an afterthought.

title: Window Replacement Contractor in Los Angeles, CA
metaTitle: Window Replacement Contractor in Los Angeles, CA | Red Stag Construction
metaDescription: Window replacement contractor in Los Angeles. Vinyl, aluminum & wood windows. Supply, installation & permits. Serving Beverly Hills, Studio City & all of LA. Call (626) 652-2303.
h1: Window Replacement Contractor in Los Angeles, CA
intro:
Window replacement in Los Angeles is both a comfort upgrade and an energy compliance requirement. Title 24 — California's energy code — mandates specific performance standards for windows in any permitted renovation. A GC who pulls proper permits handles this as part of the job. One who doesn't can leave you with a compliance issue at resale.

Red Stag supplies and installs windows across all product categories: vinyl replacement windows for budget-conscious projects, aluminum-clad wood windows for mid to high-end applications, and full-frame replacements where the existing frame needs to be removed. We work with Andersen, Milgard, Pella, and other major manufacturers depending on project requirements.

In older homes throughout Sherman Oaks, Studio City, and the western hills, single-pane windows are still common. Replacing them with dual-pane, low-E glass reduces energy bills, reduces exterior noise, and is required by Title 24 in any permitted project that touches the window opening.

We handle the full scope: removal of existing windows, framing repairs if needed, installation, flashing, stucco repair around the opening, interior trim, and final inspection.

title: Fence Company in Los Angeles, CA
metaTitle: Fence Company in Los Angeles, CA | Red Stag Construction
metaDescription: Licensed fence company in Los Angeles. Wood, vinyl, iron & chain link fencing. Installation, repair & gates. Serving Studio City, Sherman Oaks, Beverly Hills & all of LA. Call (626) 652-2303.
h1: Fence Company in Los Angeles, CA
intro:
Fencing in Los Angeles serves three purposes: privacy, security, and curb appeal. In neighborhoods like Beverly Hills, Bel Air, and Hidden Hills, the right fence is part of the property's presentation. In the SFV, it's often the first thing a buyer or renter notices.

Red Stag installs wood fences, vinyl fences, wrought iron fencing, aluminum fencing, chain link, and custom gate systems. We also handle fence repairs, replacements, and gate motor installations.

Wood fencing remains the most popular choice in residential Los Angeles — cedar and redwood for their natural appearance and durability in the California climate. Vinyl is increasingly common for low-maintenance applications. Wrought iron and aluminum are standard in hillside and high-end properties where aesthetics and longevity matter.

Gate installation — including automatic sliding gates and swing gates with keypad, remote, or intercom access — is part of our scope. We handle the electrical rough-in, gate hardware, motor installation, and programming.

All fence installations involving permits — anything over 6 feet in height or in a front yard setback — are pulled and inspected correctly. No shortcuts.

metaDescription: Licensed general contractor in Los Angeles since 2011. Design-build, custom homes, ADUs, remodels & more. Serving Beverly Hills, Bel Air, Malibu & all of LA. License #964664. Call (626) 652-2303.
h1: General Contractor in Los Angeles, CA
intro:
A general contractor is only as good as their worst subcontractor. That's why Red Stag runs as much in-house as possible — our own crew, our own supervision, our own accountability. When you hire a GC who manages a revolving door of subs they barely know, you get the quality of the cheapest guy who showed up that day. That's not how we work.

Red Stag has been a licensed general contractor in Los Angeles since 2011. License #964664. We carry full general liability insurance and workers' compensation. Every project we take on is permitted, inspected, and closed out correctly with the LA Department of Building and Safety.

Our scope as a general contractor covers: project management, subcontractor coordination, permit management, scheduling, budget control, quality control, and final delivery. We can work from your existing architectural plans or we can design-build the entire project under one contract.

We work with homeowners, developers, and architects throughout Los Angeles. If you have a project that needs a GC who answers their phone, shows up every day, and doesn't disappear after the deposit — call us.
